business_rules.rule: The personal data form must capture all 13 fields before submission: TEXT_AREA, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, DATE_OF_BIRTH, ZIP, ORT, STREET, IBAN, BIC, VALID_FROM, MALE, FEMALE, DIVERSE
business_rules.evidence: EnumMap initialised with all 13 ModelProperties keys; action() iterates ModelProperties.values() and calls getField().toString() on each — null fields cause NullPointerException

business_rules.rule: All form field values are submitted atomically in a single JSON POST request — partial or incremental submissions are not supported
business_rules.evidence: action() builds one HashMap from all 13 fields and calls httpBinService.post(data) once

business_rules.rule: The REST submission endpoint is http://localhost:8080/post with Content-Type application/json — no runtime configuration is supported
business_rules.evidence: public static final String URL = 'http://localhost:8080'; PATH = '/post'; CONTENT_TYPE = 'application/json'

business_rules.rule: If the server response body is non-empty, the response body is broadcast to all event listeners (displayed in text area)
business_rules.evidence: if(!responseBody.isEmpty()) { eventEmitter.emit(responseBody); }

business_rules.rule: If the server response body is empty, the literal string 'Failed operation' is broadcast to all event listeners
business_rules.evidence: else { eventEmitter.emit('Failed operation'); }

business_rules.rule: After receiving a server event (successful or failed), all 9 text input fields must be cleared to empty string
business_rules.evidence: view.firstName.setText(''); view.name.setText(''); view.dateOfBirth.setText(''); view.zip.setText(''); view.ort.setText(''); view.street.setText(''); view.iban.setText(''); view.bic.setText(''); view.validFrom.setText('');

business_rules.rule: After receiving a server event, gender resets to Female=selected, Male=deselected, Diverse=deselected
business_rules.evidence: view.female.setSelected(true); view.male.setSelected(false); view.diverse.setSelected(false);

business_rules.rule: Gender selection is mutually exclusive — only one of Female (Weiblich), Male (Männlich), or Diverse (Divers) can be active at a time
business_rules.evidence: protected ButtonGroup gender = new ButtonGroup(); all three JRadioButtons added to this group

business_rules.rule: Gender is represented internally as three independent Boolean model properties (FEMALE, MALE, DIVERSE); each reflects the selected state of its radio button
business_rules.evidence: bind(view.male, ModelProperties.MALE); bind(view.female, ModelProperties.FEMALE); bind(view.diverse, ModelProperties.DIVERSE); each uses source.isSelected()

business_rules.rule: All model field values are synchronised in real time with the view — text fields update on every document insert/remove event, radio buttons update on every change event
business_rules.evidence: DocumentListener insertUpdate/removeUpdate call model.setField(content); ChangeListener calls model.setField(source.isSelected())

business_rules.rule: Gender Boolean values are serialised as string literals 'true' or 'false' in the JSON payload sent to the backend
business_rules.evidence: data.put(val.toString(), model.get(val).getField().toString()); Boolean.toString() produces 'true' or 'false'

business_rules.rule: JSON field keys in the HTTP payload use the ModelProperties enum constant names exactly (e.g. 'FIRST_NAME', 'LAST_NAME', 'DATE_OF_BIRTH', 'ZIP', 'ORT', 'STREET', 'IBAN', 'BIC', 'VALID_FROM', 'MALE', 'FEMALE', 'DIVERSE', 'TEXT_AREA')
business_rules.evidence: data.put(val.toString(), ...) where val is each ModelProperties enum constant

business_rules.rule: All 13 model fields are initialised to null at application start; no default form values are pre-populated except for text component empty strings at binding time
business_rules.evidence: new ValueModel<String>(null) and new ValueModel<Boolean>(null) for each property; bind() calls model.setField(source.getText()) which produces empty string at startup

business_rules.rule: The server response body is displayed in the TEXT_AREA component (JTextArea) after submission
business_rules.evidence: eventEmitter.subscribe(eventData -> { view.textArea.setText(eventData); ... })

business_rules.rule: The submit action is triggered exclusively by clicking the 'Anordnen' (Arrange/Order) button — no keyboard shortcut or auto-submit is provided
business_rules.evidence: view.button.addActionListener(_ -> { model.action(); })

business_rules.rule: IOException and InterruptedException from the HTTP call are not handled gracefully — they are wrapped in RuntimeException and will terminate the current operation without user feedback
business_rules.evidence: catch (IOException | InterruptedException e) { throw new RuntimeException(e); }

business_rules.rule: DATE_OF_BIRTH and VALID_FROM are captured and transmitted as plain strings — no date format validation, parsing, or normalisation is performed
business_rules.evidence: Both properties mapped to ValueModel<String>; no parsing logic anywhere in PocModel or PocPresenter

business_rules.rule: IBAN and BIC values are captured and transmitted as plain strings — no format validation (e.g. IBAN checksum, BIC structure) is performed
business_rules.evidence: Both mapped to ValueModel<String>; no validation logic in the codebase

business_rules.rule: ZIP (Postleitzahl) is stored and transmitted as a plain string without numeric or length validation
business_rules.evidence: ModelProperties.ZIP maps to ValueModel<String>; no validation in PocModel or PocPresenter

business_rules.rule: All current model field values are printed to standard output before HTTP submission for debugging purposes
business_rules.evidence: for(var val : ModelProperties.values()) { System.out.println(val.toString() + ': ' + model.get(val).getField()); }

workflows.description: The end-to-end process from user input to backend submission and UI reset

steps.action: Enters personal data into form fields (name, address, banking info, date of birth, validity date) and selects gender
Real-time: updates corresponding ValueModel entry in PocModel on every keystroke or selection change
Clicks the 'Anordnen' button to trigger submission
Iterates all 13 ModelProperties, logs values to stdout, builds a String HashMap
Serialises the HashMap to a JSON object and POSTs to http://localhost:8080/post
Reads HTTP response code and body; returns response body string
If response body is non-empty: emits response body via EventEmitter; else emits 'Failed operation'
Receives emitted event data; sets text area to event data; clears all 9 text input fields; resets gender to Female

entities.constraint: Mutually exclusive — exactly one should be true at submission

gaps_and_risks.description: No null-check before calling getField().toString() in PocModel.action() — submitting with any unfilled field causes NullPointerException
No input validation for IBAN, BIC, DATE_OF_BIRTH, VALID_FROM, ZIP — invalid formats are silently transmitted
IOException and InterruptedException are wrapped as RuntimeException — no user-visible error dialog is shown on HTTP failure
ViewData class is empty — view state DTO is not implemented, limiting extensibility for future view state management
Hardcoded endpoint (http://localhost:8080/post) — not configurable without recompilation; unsuitable for multi-environment deployment
HttpBinService is instantiated directly in PocModel (new HttpBinService()) — not injected, preventing mocking or testing
